task: Find the store location and hours of the closest Trader Joe's to zip code 90028 and set it as my home store.
graderReasoning: The agent found the closest store to zip 90028 as Hollywood (206), with evidence from the suggested stores list showing it at 1600 N Vine St, Los Angeles, CA 90028, 0.06 miles away. The agent opened the store details page at https://locations.traderjoes.com/CA/Los-Angeles/206/ and verified the hours as Monday–Sunday 9AM–9PM. For setting the home store, the site’s store finder showed the Hollywood result with a checkmark-style generic element labeled "my store" instead of a "set as my store" button, while other stores still had "set as my store" buttons. The agent also verified localStorage selectedStore = Hollywood (206), confirming it was set as the home/current store. The banner text remaining "My Store: Los Angeles" is consistent with a generic city label and does not negate that the correct store was set.
final_result_response:
Done. The closest Trader Joe’s to 90028 is already set as your home store:

Hollywood (206)  
1600 N Vine St  
Los Angeles, CA 90028  
Phone: 323-856-0689  
Distance: 0.06 miles

Hours:  
Monday to Sunday: 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM
action_history: Opening Trader Joe's website: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.traderjoes.com/');
Searching by zip code: await page.locator('e111').fill('90028');
Searching by zip code: await page.locator('e110').click();
Opening closest store details: await page.locator('e187').click();
Explicitly selecting Hollywood as home store: await page.locator('e188').click();
Reopening home store finder: await page.locator('e1').click();

screenshots.title: Explicitly selecting Hollywood as home store
